user_goal: 在 B013 之后做 Regime-Adaptive 策略的 stress validation 扩展：通过 yfinance opt-in fetcher（pip 包，免 API key，scripts/ 唯一网络入口）一次性获取真实 9 资产 2018-2025 snapshot，在真实数据上跑 B013 的 2020+2022 stress 回测，与 B006 momentum、B010 risk parity、static 60/40 跨策略对比,并以经验证据签收：把 B013 之前 skipped 的 stress gate 翻成 pass 或 fail（带经验数字）。若 fail 则写 proposed-learnings 建议参数 retune，**不修改 B013 策略代码**。全程保持 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。Stooq pivot 历史：F001/F002 原 Stooq 实现因 upstream apikey gate 不可用，已替换为 yfinance 实现。
evaluator_feedback: B014 yfinance fetcher itself is operational and returned real CSVs for all 9 tickers, but scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py still fails closed on the first calendar day of the requested window and on SGOV short-history handling: it rejects SPY because 2018-01-01 is a market holiday (first trading day is 2018-01-02) and rejects SGOV because the real first available date from yfinance is 2020-06-01 rather than 2020-05-28. The data source pivot is otherwise successful; generator should patch the snapshot importer/coverage logic to accept first-trading-day start coverage and allow SGOV's actual first available date, while keeping the existing research-only, no-live/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI boundaries intact. No B013 strategy code changes are needed.

generator_handoff.fix_direction_delivered: Stooq → yfinance data-source pivot (planner override of Codex's apikey-support direction). Generator deleted the Stooq fetcher + tests, added yfinance to project dependencies, and implemented yfinance-based equivalents that preserve all prior safety semantics.
fix_tasks_completed: Added scripts/fetch_yfinance_regime_adaptive_csvs.py — opt-in CLI using yfinance.Ticker.history(auto_adjust=True, actions=False, raise_errors=True); writes <SYMBOL>.csv with lowercase canonical schema date,open,high,low,close,adjusted_close,volume (.6f formatting); preserves SGOV short-history allowance (inception 2020-05-28) and >=95% coverage gate for other 8 tickers; fails closed on yfinance exception, empty DataFrame, schema mismatch (missing required columns), coverage shortfall, or missing flag.

Added tests/unit/test_yfinance_fetcher.py — 23 unit tests patching the fetcher's yfinance wrapper to return canned pandas DataFrames. Coverage: happy-path 9-ticker, missing-flag refusal, yfinance exception fail-closed, empty DataFrame fail-closed, schema mismatch fail-closed, non-SGOV short-history rejection, SGOV short-history acceptance under default allowance, SGOV rejection when allowance disabled, date_to<date_from fail-closed, CLI main success/failure, arg parser parses, output schema and filename casing, no real socket usage, no forbidden broker/AI imports, no execution phrasing, no os.environ reads, yfinance is the only authorized third-party import.
B013 strategy modules untouched (verified by B013 safety regression tests).
Local checks pass: pytest 359 passed (336 prior + 23 new), ruff clean, compileall silent, mypy strict 42 source files clean.

expected_outputs.F006: docs/test-reports/B014-regime-adaptive-stress-validation-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md + optional framework/proposed-learnings.md entry if max DD > 15%

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B014 data-source pivot: Codex reported Stooq /q/d/l/ endpoint now apikey-gated, blocking F003 real acquisition. Codex requested Generator add apikey support. User asked for an automated path that does not require apikey procurement. Planner overrode Codex's handoff direction: pivot Stooq → yfinance (pip package, free, no API key). Updated B014 spec with Amendment 2026-05-14 (yfinance is sole authorized network entry; stdlib-only constraint relaxed to allow yfinance in scripts/ only). Updated F001/F002 acceptance to specify yfinance. Generator handoff replaced with explicit fix tasks: delete Stooq fetcher + tests, add yfinance dependency, add yfinance fetcher + tests, preserve SGOV / >=95% coverage / opt-in / fail-closed semantics. Status remains fixing for Generator pickup. Original B014 hard decisions (universe, stress windows, cross-strategy comparison, no B013 strategy code mutation, proposed-learnings on stress failure) all retained.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14 B014 fixing (round 1, Stooq → yfinance pivot): Per planner override, replaced the Stooq fetcher (apikey-gated upstream) with a yfinance-based opt-in fetcher. Deleted scripts/fetch_stooq_regime_adaptive_csvs.py and tests/unit/test_stooq_fetcher.py. Added yfinance>=0.2.40 to pyproject.toml [project.dependencies]; bootstrapped pip into .venv (it had none) and installed -e .[dev] locally — confirmed yfinance 1.3.0 + pandas 3.0.3 resolve. New scripts/fetch_yfinance_regime_adaptive_csvs.py uses yfinance.Ticker.history(start=..., end=date_to+1d (exclusive), auto_adjust=True, actions=False, raise_errors=True) via a top-level _fetch_ticker_history wrapper so tests can monkeypatch it; keeps lowercase canonical schema (date,open,high,low,close,adjusted_close,volume) with .6f formatting; close mirrors adjusted_close because auto_adjust=True. Preserved SGOV short-history allowance (inception 2020-05-28) + 95% coverage gate for other 8 tickers. Fail-closed branches: missing flag, date_to<date_from, yfinance raising any exception, None/empty DataFrame, missing required columns, sub-95% coverage on non-SGOV. New tests/unit/test_yfinance_fetcher.py: 23 tests, 0 real network — happy path / missing flag / yfinance exception / empty DataFrame / schema mismatch / non-SGOV short-history rejection / SGOV short-history acceptance under default allowance / SGOV rejection when allowance disabled / date_to<date_from / CLI main success+failure / arg parser / output schema+filename casing / no real socket / no forbidden broker-AI imports / no execution phrasing / no os.environ / yfinance is the only third-party import. Pitfall: pandas.Timestamp inherits from datetime which inherits from date, so my initial isinstance(value, date) shortcut returned the Timestamp as-is and then `row_date < effective_from` raised TypeError; fixed by reducing through to_pydatetime().date() and datetime branches first. Mock builder also had to gate SGOV inception manually so 'disabled allowance' could fail-closed deterministically. Local checks: pytest 359 passed (336 prior + 23 new), ruff clean, compileall silent, mypy strict 42 source files clean. Status moved to reverifying for Codex F003-F006 with fix_rounds=1.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-14: yfinance fetcher execution succeeded and wrote real CSVs for the 9-asset universe, but snapshot import failed closed because scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py requires coverage starting on the exact requested date. Evidence: SPY rejected due 2018-01-01 being a market holiday (first trading day 2018-01-02) and SGOV rejected because the real first available yfinance date is 2020-06-01. The next generator fix should relax snapshot import coverage to first trading day coverage and the actual SGOV inception/first-available date, without touching B013 strategy code.
